# Water Shutoff

**Summary**: The process of blocking water flow from a well to improve oil production.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-alabdrabalnabi|Alabdrabalnabi, 2024]] investigated various chemical and mechanical methods for water shutoff.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-alabdrabalnabi|Alabdrabalnabi, 2024]] Crucial for improving economic life and environmental safety in mature fields.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-alabdrabalnabi|Alabdrabalnabi, 2024]] Evaluated via plugging efficiency and flow reduction.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Nanosilica-based gels exhibit an exceptional plugging efficiency (100%). ([[2024-alabdrabalnabi|Alabdrabalnabi, 2024, p. 21]])
